title: Individuals having procedural capacity
doc_html:
CHAPTER 3.  PARTIES DEFENDANT

Art. 731.  Individuals having procedural capacity

A competent major and a competent emancipated minor have the procedural capacity to be sued.
doc_text:
CHAPTER 3.  PARTIES DEFENDANT
Art. 731.  Individuals having procedural capacity
A competent major and a competent emancipated minor have the procedural capacity to be sued.
